full_text:
Zhu Jun (Gongwei) 朱儁 (公偉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Jun (朱儁), styledGongwei (公偉), was born in Kuai Ji City (Presently Kuai Ji in Zhejiang Province). Han minister who fought against the Yellow Scarves with Liu Bei and Sun Jian. Zhu Jun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Dong Zhuo, and Li Jue. Zhu Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
